'''âng-z-m''' ('''kangazam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impalisade|impalisade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impalisade|impalisade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-z-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangazam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingazam|thingazam]] || [[word:jingazam|jingazam]] || [[word:shingazam|shingazam]] || [[word:kingazam|kingazam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungazam|thuthungazam]] || [[word:jujungazam|jujungazam]] || [[word:shushungazam|shushungazam]] || [[word:kukungazam|kukungazam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungazam|thungazam]] || [[word:jungazam|jungazam]] || [[word:shungazam|shungazam]] || [[word:kungazam|kungazam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungazam|thungazam]] || [[word:jungazam|jungazam]] || [[word:shungazam|shungazam]] || [[word:kungazam|kungazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengazam|thengazam]] || [[word:jengazam|jengazam]] || [[word:shengazam|shengazam]] || [[word:kengazam|kengazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongazam|thothongazam]] || [[word:jojongazam|jojongazam]] || [[word:shoshongazam|shoshongazam]] || [[word:kokongazam|kokongazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongazam|thongazam]] || [[word:jongazam|jongazam]] || [[word:shongazam|shongazam]] || [[word:kongazam|kongazam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongazam|thongazam]] || [[word:jongazam|jongazam]] || [[word:shongazam|shongazam]] || [[word:kongazam|kongazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngazam|thĂŠngazam]] || [[word:jĂŠngazam|jĂŠngazam]] || [[word:shĂŠngazam|shĂŠngazam]] || [[word:kĂŠngazam|kĂŠngazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangazam|thathangazam]] || [[word:jajangazam|jajangazam]] || [[word:shashangazam|shashangazam]] || [[word:kakangazam|kakangazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangazam|thangazam]] || [[word:jangazam|jangazam]] || [[word:shangazam|shangazam]] || [[word:kangazam|kangazam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangazam|thangazam]] || [[word:jangazam|jangazam]] || [[word:shangazam|shangazam]] || [[word:kangazam|kangazam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangazam|shangazam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangazam|goshangazam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangazam|gokishangazam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangazamnĂŒ|shangazamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangazamnknĂŒ|goshangazamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazamnĂŒ|gokishangazamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangazamshĂ«|shangazamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangazamnkshĂ«|goshangazamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangazamshĂ«|gokishangazamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazamro|shangazamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazamnkro|goshangazamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazamro|gokishangazamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazamu|shangazamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazamnkmu|goshangazamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazamu|gokishangazamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangazamsher|shangazamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangazamnksher|goshangazamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangazamsher|gokishangazamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangazamng|shangazamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangazamnkng|goshangazamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangazamng|gokishangazamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangazamya|shangazamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangazamnkya|goshangazamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangazamya|gokishangazamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangazamyam|shangazamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangazamnkyam|goshangazamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangazamyam|gokishangazamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazamnĂŒshĂ«|shangazamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangazamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangazamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazamnĂŒro|shangazamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazamnknĂŒro|goshangazamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazamnĂŒro|gokishangazamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazamnĂŒmu|shangazamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazamnknĂŒmu|goshangazamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazamnĂŒmu|gokishangazamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazamshĂ«nĂŒ|shangazamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangazamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangazamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazamshĂ«ro|shangazamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazamnkshĂ«ro|goshangazamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazamshĂ«ro|gokishangazamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazamshĂ«mu|shangazamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazamnkshĂ«mu|goshangazamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazamshĂ«mu|gokishangazamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazamronĂŒ|shangazamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazamnkronĂŒ|goshangazamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazamronĂŒ|gokishangazamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazamroshĂ«|shangazamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazamnkroshĂ«|goshangazamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazamroshĂ«|gokishangazamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangazamromu|shangazamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangazamnkromu|goshangazamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangazamromu|gokishangazamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangazamunĂŒ|shangazamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangazamnkmunĂŒ|goshangazamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangazamunĂŒ|gokishangazamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangazamushĂ«|shangazamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangazamnkmushĂ«|goshangazamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangazamushĂ«|gokishangazamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangazamuro|shangazamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangazamnkmuro|goshangazamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangazamuro|gokishangazamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
